name: The Journeying Three Magi
desc: Reveal 3 Level 4 Spellcaster monsters with different Attributes from your Deck; your opponent chooses 1 of them to add to your hand, then you choose 1 of the rest to send to the GY, and shuffle the other into the Deck. You can only activate 1 "The Journeying Three Magi" per turn.
strings: Reveal 3 Level 4 Spellcasters with different Attributes
